groups.mechanism: hybridize A10 moderate-selectivity geometry with A11 near-300 phase anchors
groups.distinct_from_prior: combines A10 selectivity source and A11 phase source instead of rerunning either family
groups.purpose: recover projection selectivity while keeping selected phase near 300

groups.mechanism: small-gap and orientation repair around A11 near-300 but leaky family
groups.distinct_from_prior: uses A11 only as a phase-local anchor and changes matrix-repair knobs
groups.purpose: keep near-300 phase while reducing blocked-y leakage

groups.mechanism: non-B60 anchor micro-escape using diagonal/noswap candidates not in A8 donor family
groups.distinct_from_prior: excludes A8 B60 donor family and avoids A12 mini-escape geometries
groups.purpose: last bounded H600-only escape before H650 planning

decision_after_future_run: if phase near 300 but selectivity weak -> one matrix-repair refinement only
if selectivity good but phase not 300 -> reassign donor, do not force
if no near-miss -> stop H600 B300 and plan H650 escape hatch
